name: Category Navigation
description: Horizontal pill or tab navigation for filtering content by category. Scrollable on narrow viewports. Pairs with post-list and product-grid patterns.

slots.categories: Row of Chip or Segmented elements with active state styling
slots.count-badges: Optional Badge on each category showing item count

command-center.notes: Entire nav uses cc-bar. Active category gets cc-glow. Count badges use cc-data. Category labels use cc-label.
